words.def: an accidental hole that allows something (fluid or light etc.) to enter or escape
words.zh: n. 漏洞, 漏處, 漏出, 洩漏

words.def: a body of (usually fresh) water surrounded by land
words.zh: n. 湖, 池, 色澱

words.def: a general name for beer made with a top fermenting yeast; in some of the United States an ale is (by law) a brew of more than 4% alcohol by volume
